# Virginia Budget Includes Teacher Raises, Data Center Tax Changes

**TL;DR:** Virginia's new state budget includes raises for teachers and revises how data centers are taxed.

The Virginia General Assembly approved a state budget that includes salary increases for teachers across the commonwealth. The legislation also modifies tax policy for data centers, a sector significant to Virginia's economy. The changes take effect as schools and businesses prepare for the fiscal year ahead.

**Why it matters:** Chesterfield County teachers will benefit from the state-funded raises, while local businesses in the data center and related sectors will see changes to their tax obligations under the new framework.

[Read the source at Google News: Virginia Government →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
